title: coryphopteris castanea
intro: Coryphopteris castanea, also known as the brown fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to tropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Coryphopteris castanea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Coryphopteris castanea is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
